name: SCC_SetEnergyTransferType
title: SCC_SetEnergyTransferType
description: Sets the desired charging mode for a running SCC session. For the list of all valid charging modes, see the SCC specification.

Sets the offered energy transfer type (DIN 70121) resp. -mode (ISO 15118) for a running SCC session. In case of ISO 15118, a list with one element is created. For the list of all valid values, see the SCC specification.

parameters.name: EnergyTransferType (EV/EVSE)
parameters.description: Desired charging mode as string. Please make sure the string entered is a valid according to the schema.
